source_meta.source_document: ACTIS Total Hip System and Pinnacle Acetabular Cup System Surgical Technique

TRAYS.Tray Notes: Official DePuy Synthes materials support dedicated acetabular and femoral instrumentation for the ACTIS and Pinnacle total hip construct.

COMPONENTS.Component Notes: Official ACTIS materials describe the cementless femoral stem family used in the construct.
Official Pinnacle materials describe the acetabular shell family used in the construct.
Official Pinnacle materials describe compatible acetabular liner options.
Official construct materials describe modular femoral head options used with the ACTIS stem and Pinnacle cup.

row.system_notes: Cementless primary total hip construct anchored to the official ACTIS stem and PINNACLE cup product pages and surgical techniques.
